subcodes.first_line: O Afnán! Upon thee be My Glory! This day is the Day of true unity, and the blessed Word: "There is no God but Him." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی امروز روز توحید حقیقی است و کلمه مبارکه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @the power of words; of speech, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual transformation
